summary: Iteration 14: Verified all 6 reported issues are FIXED. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 6 issues verified working via Playwright.

Issue #1: French accents - 'Établissements' has correct accent in navigation

Issue #3: 'Rapports' is NOT in main navigation (correct)

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 reported issues have been successfully fixed
French accents properly implemented in Layout.jsx navigation labels
Rapports moved from main nav to Documents page as a tab (Documents.jsx)
CarteRDC.jsx has accurate SVG paths for all 26 DRC provinces

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing data from iteration 13.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user-reported issues are now fixed and verified. The app uses cookie-based auth (httpOnly). API URLs in frontend use relative paths (/api). Dashboard shows 953 establishments, 4114 teachers, 126804 students across 26 provinces. Rapports is now a tab inside Documents page, not in main navigation.
